tools.name: recommerce-faq
tools.description:
Answer frequently asked questions about Recommerce. Available themes:
      - refurbishedProduct: What is a refurbished product
      - deliveryOptions: Delivery options, costs and delays
      - warranty: Warranty information (36 months)
      - cosmeticGrades: Cosmetic grades explanation (100% functional, different appearances)
      - whyRefurbished: Why buy refurbished (ecological, affordable, 60 quality checks)
      - technicalSpecifications: Where to find technical specifications
      - accessories: Accessories info (included kit, optional purchases)
